daily_riddles.str: I see you wish to acquire greatness. I'd never block your efforts.
This is a part of a fantasy, but I wouldn't want to be around it when it comes to a close.
1812 is over, sure, but there's a way to bring it back. I can go on, but you should know how by now.
Bring me a bandit. I don't even need all of him.
I could never tell you what I want, because I'm not a fan of spoilers, and I'd prefer to keep things cool.
My paradise is lost, but perhaps you can bring me halfway there.
If you're a record breaker, stay away from this.
I'd like a huckleberry. Know where I can find one?
If you shoot this, would it be redundant? At the very least, I'll know you're bored.
Everyone asks the gods for these. Just once, I'd like to get one.
You can silence this, but it will never die.
A store full of wonders, none of which are for sale, is exactly the mark I'd like to spot.
I'd like to remove some underlings from my employ. Give me a place to put them.
Spark my memories of the open range.
I'd like a bright idea, but remember that I'm a city girl at heart.
I'm undecided, but I think the cowboy life calls to me on this one.
Block out a little time to tune this the right way and that's what you'll have.
If you ever had to use the bathroom in a dungeon, theres a chance you will put this together.
Don't make an assumption, presume, or suppose - just take this for what it is and igneore the distractions.
There aren't any drinks to be found here, but if they were, they'd be good for your blood.
A creature of roads and rubber. It is dangerous to go alone, but even moreso, where beasts such as this are concerned.
Time to get low. Perhaps this choice will cheese you off, but I suggest you move along.
It's worth more than a nickel, has nothing to do with chickens, and up to eight of them are correct, which I find baffling.
Sorry, I can't quite racal what I wanted for this one. Call it a sign of the times.
Don't blink.
Ag! You woke me up. I dreamt of when I was a smaller, simpler goddess. Perhaps you could remind me of that time?
Find me a shimmering thing of wonder - I don't care what, so long as it's ausome!
Bessie's a good name for a cow. Put it together with the sea France, and you have the first step in getting me what I want...
2623, you'll know what to do. But there are alternates.
Actually, I can't think of anything. Therefore, the opposite must do.
Steel yourself, for I grow weary (or is it hungry?) and must set this discussion aside.
These are spooky. I know everybody has one, but getting it to me is the key.
Hercules never defeated one of these, though, flames are still involved.
Whenever I sea these, I remember to keep quiet
Get me my favorite topping, and remember - I'm a fun girl
What's your favorite color? I can't decide between pink and yellow, so you'll have to bring me both.
I have trouble remembering things, so get me something that never forgets.
Get me something to paint-and don't bangle it up.
I want something strange, deadly, and otherworldly - but nothing from Mercury, please.
Take one down from its perch and bring it here - just make sure you don't sluice it!
What do Vikings, Lumberjacks and Shrubbery have in common?
I hate to break it to you, but it's time to give me some space.
Most of the things I want are a mystery, but this one is especially so.
I had a plan to get something tasty, but it's full of holes.
I'd like something sweet, and that's all I'll say! Buzz off!

riddles.str: The breath of life is meaningless to me. I solely desire that which is eternal - seek it from the madman. One will do.
Reflect on this: what is the roll of the mirror? I want one.
If you're smart, you probably have plenty of this to spare. Just make sure you package it nicely - a well-wrapped gift to brighten my day, but only once.
Bind a storm within a sphere, and place it in my grasp. Once.
That from which all things spring, yet forever buried. Bring me one.
The Anemoi will play their song for you with this, and with one, so shall I.
In a world of growth, this is forever locked, and all the dearer for it. I'd like one.
You mortals all desire more of one thing. Find it, wrap it again in riches, and bring it to me, but only once.
Reflect on this: what is the roll of the mirror? I want two.

It flies without wings, is harmless but can kill you, and you can ask all day long about it and get different - but correct - answers! Bring the past, present, and future captured for all eternity... but only once.
Bind a storm within a sphere, and place it in my grasp. Twice.
The breath of life is meaningless to me. I solely desire that which is eternal - seek it from the madman. Two are needed.
The Anemoi will play their song for you with this, and with two, so shall I.
If you're smart, you probably have plenty of this to spare. Just make sure you package it nicely - a well-wrapped gift to brighten my day, twice.
That from which all things spring, yet forever buried. Bring me two.
In a world of growth, this is forever locked, and all the dearer for it. I'd like two.
You mortals all desire more of one thing. Find it, wrap it again in riches, and bring it to me, twice.
Reflect on this: what is the roll of the mirror? I want three.

It flies without wings, is harmless but can kill you, and you can ask all day long about it and get different - but correct - answers! Bring the past, present, and future captured for all eternity... twice.
The Anemoi will play their song for you with this, and with three, so shall I.
Bind a storm within a sphere, and place it in my grasp. Three times.
